prompt: Brand this sneaker with the Nike Swoosh in black on the outer side and ‘AIR MAX’ text on the heel tab, matching the shoe’s stitching and curvature.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Add a black Nike Swoosh logo to the outer, visible side of the sneaker. Additionally, place the text ‘AIR MAX’ onto the heel tab. Both the Nike Swoosh and the ‘AIR MAX’ text should conform naturally to the shoe’s existing stitching and curvature, appearing as integrated branding.
objects: black Nike Swoosh logo on the outer, visible side of the sneaker
'AIR MAX' text on the heel tab
